ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee is based */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title of the employee */,
  "salary_paid" REAL /* Salary paid to the employee */,
  "salary_bin" TEXT /* Salary range bin */,
  "taxable_benefits" REAL /* Taxable benefits received by the employee */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* Total compensation including salary and benefits */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the record was made */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has been in service */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the employee's job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Schools, Public Safety) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Official job title within the organization */,
  "sunshine_job_title" TEXT /* Job title as reported in the 'Sunshine List' */,
  "job_title_category" TEXT /* Category of the job title (e.g., management, technical, administrative) */,
  "job_title_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title (e.g., junior, senior, executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_records" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the compensation record */,
  "salary_paid" REAL /* Salary paid to the employee */,
  "salary_bin" TEXT /* Salary range bin */,
  "taxable_benefits" REAL /* Taxable benefits received by the employee */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* Total compensation including salary and benefits */,
  "compensation_type" TEXT /* Type of compensation (e.g., base salary, overtime pay, bonus) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment for the compensation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_bins" (
  "salary_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary bin */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of salary */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the bin */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement, education) */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the provider for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the benefit was provided */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "benefit_enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "benefit_termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee terminated the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_province" TEXT /* Province or state of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the department belongs to */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_department_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the department assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the department assignment */,
  "department_transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the department transfer (e.g., promotion, demotion, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "role_assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "role_termination_date" TEXT /* Date the role was terminated for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
